ext.description: Syntax highlighting, LSP (completion/hover/diagnostics), and snippets for HexParse script language.
snippet.nestedList.label: Nested List
snippet.parenPattern.label: Paren Pattern
snippet.bracePattern.label: Brace Pattern
snippet.bracePattern.description: Non-functional pattern wrapper (brace, equivalent to paren)
snippet.vec3.label: Vector (3-axis)
snippet.vec2.label: Vector (2-axis)
snippet.vec1.label: Vector (1-axis)
snippet.entity.label: Entity UUID
snippet.strq.label: Quoted String
snippet.num.label: Number Pattern
snippet.mask.label: Mask Pattern
snippet.raw.label: Raw Pattern
snippet.macroRef.label: Macro Ref
snippet.commentIota.label: Comment Iota
snippet.tabIndent.label: Tab Indent
completion.entityUuid.doc: Entity reference by UUID format: entity_<uuid>
completion.num.doc: Numerical Reflection pattern. Output: PatternIota. Example: num_1.375
completion.mask.doc: Bookkeeper's Gambit mask. Use - and v chars. Example: mask_--vv--
completion.comment.doc: Comment displayed as text but not executed. Same limitations as strings.
completion.tab.doc: Comment containing linebreak + leading spaces of given amount.
completion.tabExplicit.doc: Same as tab but with explicit count.
completion.raw.doc: Pattern with given angle signature (e.g. _wedsaq). Output: PatternIota
completion.macro.doc: User-defined macro. Replace macro_name with your defined macro.
hover.thoth: **Thoth** dialect — built-in dialect for single token parsing
hover.iris: **Iris** dialect — built-in dialect for single token parsing
hover.mask:
**Mask Pattern** (`mask_<pattern>`) — Bookkeeper's Gambit → PatternIota

Use `-` (dash) and `v` characters.

Example: `mask_--vv--`
hover.comment: **Comment Iota** — CommentIota displayed as text, not executed.
hover.tab: **Tab Indent** — CommentIota with linebreak + leading spaces. Auto-added on multi-line input.
hover.string:
**String Literal** (`{text}`) — StringIota

Text is preserved as-is without pattern matching.
hover.rawPattern:
**Raw Pattern** — Pattern with angle signature `{sig}`

→ PatternIota
hover.macro:
**Macro** — User-defined macro reference: `{text}`

→ resolved at parse time
hover.groupOpen:
**Group Open** — Non-functional pattern wrapper (`{bracket}`)

Equivalent to Introspection. Must be closed by `)` or `}`.
hover.groupClose:
**Group Close** — Closes a group opened by `(` or `{`

Equivalent to Retrospection.
hover.listOpen: **Nested List Open** — Begins a ListIota. Must be closed by `]`.
hover.pattern:
**Pattern** — Normal static pattern matched by registration key: `{text}`

→ PatternIota
hover.numericLiteral:
**Numeric Constant** (`{text}`) — Bare number literal

Not a pattern. Use `num_{text}` for a numerical reflection PatternIota.
validation.invalidUuid: Invalid UUID format after entity_: "{uuid}". Expected format: xxxxxxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxxxxxxxxxx
validation.maskChars: Mask pattern invalid characters: "{m}". Only - (dash) and v allowed.
validation.copyMaskChars: Copy mask invalid characters: "{m}". Only - (dash) and n allowed.
validation.unmatchedGroupClose: Unmatched ')' or '}' — extra closing group bracket
command.lehmer.title: Calculate Lehmer Code from Selection
config.lehmerTemplate.description: Template for Lehmer code output. Use {result} as placeholder for the calculated Lehmer code value.
